name: 午夜酒吧（買醉場景）
description: 女主發現真相後的情感宣洩場景，為男女主的親密接觸創造合理契機。醉酒讓角色卸下防備，推動感情線。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Tonight's tab is on me, everyone. Cheers. / Three whole years... Jerk. How could you do this to me. / Gun, is this really how you're getting back at Yanju?
examples.context: 女主發現真相後的情感宣洩場景，為男女主的親密接觸創造合理契機。醉酒讓角色卸下防備，推動感情線。
